added.statement: Oklo can preserve financing flexibility through the next licensing milestones.

added.drift: Catalyst tracking added so future reviews separate power-demand validation from Oklo-specific execution evidence.
added.summary: Maintain watchlist status until catalysts move from narrative support to dated, source-backed milestones.

new.summary: Initial ledger created. Demand backdrop is attractive, but investability depends on licensing cadence, named customer quality, and financing evidence.

old.summary: Initial ledger created. Demand backdrop is attractive, but investability depends on licensing and financing evidence.

thesis.new: Advanced nuclear developers may benefit if AI data center demand increases the value of firm, clean power, but commercialization timing and regulatory execution remain the core constraints.
thesis.old: Advanced nuclear developers may benefit if AI data center demand increases the value of firm, clean power, but commercialization timing and regulatory execution remain the core constraints.
